summary: Remove double vertical padding caused by py-* on both the <section> and the inner container <div>. The section has py-10 sm:py-16 (40px/64px) AND the container has py-16 md:py-24 (64px/96px), stacking to 104px/160px total. The fix aligns with the established dark-mode pattern: keep section-level py-* for inter-block spacing and remove the inner container py-* padding. The charcoal pseudo-element already extends via negative insets (before:-inset-*) to cover the section padding zone, so no additional inner padding is needed. TestimonialsCarousel has the exact same bug and should be fixed simultaneously.

correctPattern.pseudoElement: before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8 extends to cover section padding zone

analysis.rootCause: DEC-013 added py-16 md:py-24 to the container to put padding inside the charcoal background, but did not remove the pre-existing section-level py-10 sm:py-16. The dark-mode pattern uses the pseudo-element negative insets to extend the charcoal card outward to fill the section padding zone -- no inner padding is needed.

designDecisions.question: How should the vertical padding be structured for always-dark carousel blocks?
designDecisions.recommendation: Follow the established CardsCarousel dark-mode pattern: section-level py-10 sm:py-16 provides inter-block spacing, pseudo-element negative insets extend the charcoal card to fill that space, and no inner container py-* padding is needed. Remove py-16 md:py-24 from the container div in both DynamicContentCarousel and TestimonialsCarousel.
designDecisions.decision: Remove container py-16 md:py-24; keep section py-10 sm:py-16 only
designDecisions.evidence: CardsCarousel.php uses py-10 sm:py-16 on section + no py-* on container + before:-inset-(--side-gutter) md:before:-inset-8. CardsGrid.php follows same pattern. The dark-mode.md pattern doc confirms the pseudo-element extends to cover section padding zone.

checkpoints: Verify vertical padding is no longer doubled -- total top/bottom space should match other blocks (e.g., CardsCarousel dark mode)
Verify charcoal pseudo-element still extends properly to cover the section padding zone
Verify content (heading, carousel cards) is not clipped or overlapping the charcoal boundary
Compare mobile (375w) and desktop (1440w) spacing to ensure both breakpoints look correct
